parameters.name: funkyUrl
parameters.description: The base URL for Operator to call.

parameters.name: X-Request-ID
parameters.description: Identifier for log tracing. Please use a mixed alphanumeric string in the form of a UUID, with a length of up to 64 characters.

parameters.name: gameCode
parameters.description: Specify game code to identify game.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: The name that player prefers to show in game.

parameters.name: playerId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: User currency ***(if you want to use kcurrency please contact to FunkySupport)***.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description:
The language of the player.
Will return English if the specified language code is not supported or recognized.

parameters.name: playerIp
parameters.description:
Player’s IP at the moment.
This is for preventing players from betting through VPN.
***(Please enter the correct country’s IP for real players due to regional restrictions, API testing is not subject to this requirement)***

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: User session from platform, the unique ID when the player launch game. Max length is 300 characters.

parameters.name: redirectUrl
parameters.description:
If your site need to redirect to a specified URL, the parameter redirectUrl is necessary for overwriting the original behavior of Home/Back button e.g. close window or go to the previous page.
Calling without this parameter will keep the original behavior.

parameters.name: isTestAccount
parameters.description: A flag indicates if the account is for testing or not.Default value set to false

parameters.name: maxBet
parameters.description: The maximum bet amount that player can place.
